documents.title: Black Sand Agency - Operating Playbook
documents.content:
# Black Sand Operating Playbook

## Mission
Build autonomous AI agents that handle the grunt work of B2B sales and marketing, so founders can focus on closing deals and building product.

## Core Principles
1. **Agents First** -- Every repetitive process gets an agent before it gets a hire.
2. **Speed Over Perfection** -- Ship MVPs in days, iterate based on real client feedback.
3. **Transparent Metrics** -- If we can't measure it, we don't promise it.
4. **Compounding Content** -- Every insight we generate becomes a content asset.

## Team Structure
- **Trinkster (Founder/Operator)** -- Product, engineering, client delivery
- **Sergio (Co-founder)** -- Strategy, finance, partnerships
- **Juan Andres (Co-founder)** -- Content, brand, community
- **Wolve (AI Lead Agent)** -- Orchestrates all sub-agents, handles complex reasoning

## Daily Cadence
- 7:00 AM -- Sergio reviews overnight agent outputs, flags issues
- 2:00 PM -- Wolve deep work session: lead processing, research enrichment
- 3:00 PM -- Team standup (async or sync)
- 11:00 PM -- Trinkster night build session: shipping features

## Revenue Model
- Monthly retainers: $3K-$8K per client
- Performance bonuses: 10% of pipeline generated above baseline
- Setup fees: $2K one-time for onboarding and agent customization

documents.title: AI Sales Agent - Technical Specification
documents.content:
# AI Sales Agent v2 -- Technical Spec

## Overview
The Sales Agent is a multi-step autonomous system that handles the full top-of-funnel sales process for B2B startups.

## Architecture
```
Lead Sources --> Research Agent --> Scoring Engine --> Outreach Sequencer --> Response Handler
     |                |                  |                   |                    |
   X API         Enrichment DB      ML Classifier      Template Engine      Intent Parser
```

## Components

### 1. Lead Discovery
- Monitors X for signals: funding announcements, hiring posts, pain-point discussions
- Pulls from curated lists of recently funded startups
- Input: keywords, ICP criteria, exclusion rules
- Output: raw lead objects with source metadata

### 2. Research & Enrichment
- Calls Research Agent sub-system for deep profile building
- Data points: funding amount, team size, tech stack, recent news, social activity
- Enrichment latency target: <20s per lead

### 3. Lead Scoring
- Features: funding recency, team growth rate, tech relevance, engagement level
- Model: gradient-boosted classifier trained on historical conversion data
- Score range: 0-100, threshold for outreach: 65+

### 4. Outreach Sequencer
- Multi-channel: X DM, email, LinkedIn
- Personalization: uses enriched data to customize first line and value prop
- Cadence: Day 0 (DM), Day 2 (email), Day 5 (follow-up), Day 10 (break-up)

### 5. Response Handler
- Classifies responses: interested, not now, not interested, question, OOO
- Routes interested leads to calendar booking flow
- Escalates edge cases to human team

## Tech Stack
- Runtime: Node.js + TypeScript
- LLM: Claude API (Opus for complex reasoning, Haiku for classification)
- Database: Supabase (Postgres + vector store)
- Queue: BullMQ for job orchestration
- Monitoring: Custom dashboard in Mission Control

documents.title: Client Onboarding Guide
documents.content:
# Client Onboarding Guide

## Pre-Onboarding Checklist
- [ ] Signed contract and payment method on file
- [ ] Intake questionnaire completed
- [ ] Access credentials shared (X, email, CRM)
- [ ] ICP document reviewed and approved

## Onboarding Steps

### Day 1: Discovery & Setup
1. **Kickoff Call** (45 min) -- Meet the team, align on goals and expectations
2. **ICP Deep Dive** -- Define ideal customer profile with specifics:
   - Industry verticals
   - Company size (employees, revenue)
   - Funding stage
   - Tech stack signals
   - Geographic focus
3. **Agent Provisioning** -- Spin up dedicated agent instance with client config

### Day 2: Configuration & Testing
1. **Outreach Templates** -- Customize messaging voice, value props, CTAs
2. **Lead Source Setup** -- Configure X monitoring keywords, list imports
3. **Test Run** -- Process 20 test leads end-to-end, review outputs with client
4. **Scoring Calibration** -- Adjust scoring weights based on client feedback

### Day 3-5: Soft Launch
1. **Limited Outreach** -- Run at 25% volume, monitor response quality
2. **Daily Check-ins** -- Review metrics, adjust personalization
3. **Escalation Rules** -- Define what gets routed to client vs. handled by agent

### Day 6+: Full Launch
1. **Ramp to Full Volume** -- Increase to target throughput
2. **Weekly Reports** -- Automated KPI reports via Mission Control
3. **Bi-weekly Optimization Call** -- Review performance, iterate on strategy

## Success Metrics (First 30 Days)
- 200+ leads researched and scored
- 15%+ response rate on outreach
- 5+ qualified meetings booked
- Client NPS score of 8+

documents.title: Content Strategy Brief - Q1 2026
documents.content:
# Content Strategy Brief -- Q1 2026

## Objective
Establish Black Sand as the go-to voice for AI-powered sales automation on X and LinkedIn. Drive inbound leads through thought leadership and transparent building-in-public content.

## Content Pillars

### 1. Building in Public (40%)
- Weekly progress updates on agent development
- Revenue and metrics transparency posts
- Behind-the-scenes of our tech stack and architecture decisions
- Failures and lessons learned

### 2. AI Sales Insights (30%)
- Tactical threads on AI outreach best practices
- Data-driven posts on what works in automated prospecting
- Comparisons: AI agents vs. traditional SDR workflows
- Industry trend analysis

### 3. Client Results (20%)
- Case studies and success metrics
- Before/after comparisons
- Client testimonials and quotes
- ROI breakdowns

### 4. Team & Culture (10%)
- Team member spotlights
- Our unique human+AI operating model
- Hiring and collaboration philosophy

## Publishing Cadence
- **X**: 5-7 posts/week, 2 threads/week
- **LinkedIn**: 2-3 posts/week
- **Blog**: 1 long-form piece/month

## Targets
| Metric | Current | Q1 Target |
|--------|---------|----------|
| X Followers | 2,840 | 5,000 |
| Avg. Thread Impressions | 8,400 | 15,000 |
| Inbound Leads from Content | 6 | 20 |
| Newsletter Subscribers | 320 | 1,000 |

documents.title: Meridian Labs - Pilot Results Report
documents.content:
# Meridian Labs Pilot Results

## Engagement Summary
- **Client**: Meridian Labs (Series A, AI-powered lab automation)
- **Duration**: 6 weeks (Jan 15 -- Feb 28, 2026)
- **Objective**: Generate qualified pipeline for their enterprise sales team

## Results

### Lead Generation
- **Leads Researched**: 487
- **Leads Scored 65+**: 203 (41.7% qualification rate)
- **Outreach Sent**: 185 personalized sequences
- **Response Rate**: 14.2% (industry avg: 3-5%)
- **Meetings Booked**: 12
- **Pipeline Generated**: $340,000

### Performance Breakdown
| Channel | Sent | Responses | Response Rate | Meetings |
|---------|------|-----------|---------------|----------|
| X DM | 92 | 18 | 19.6% | 6 |
| Email | 185 | 22 | 11.9% | 4 |
| LinkedIn | 74 | 8 | 10.8% | 2 |

### Key Wins
1. Landed intro with VP Sales at Compound Bio ($180K ACV opportunity)
2. Booked demo with Head of Growth at Stratify AI
3. Generated 3x more pipeline than their in-house SDR in same period
4. Client reported 85% satisfaction with lead quality

### Learnings
- X DMs significantly outperformed email for this ICP (dev tools / AI companies)
- Personalization referencing recent funding or product launches had 2.3x higher response rate
- Optimal outreach window: Tuesday-Thursday, 10 AM - 12 PM recipient local time
- Follow-up on Day 3 (not Day 2) improved response rate by 18%

## Client Testimonial
> "Black Sand's AI agent generated more qualified pipeline in 6 weeks than our SDR did in a quarter. The personalization quality was surprisingly good -- prospects didn't realize they were talking to an AI-assisted system." -- Sarah Chen, VP Revenue, Meridian Labs

## Next Steps
- Meridian Labs converting to $5K/month retainer
- Expanding scope to include LinkedIn outreach
- Setting up custom reporting dashboard in Mission Control
